free_text: Influence of projectile breakup on the 16O + 115In
Department of Physics, Addis Ababa University
Self supporting target of thickness ~1 mg/cm2. The
target was spectroscopically 99.99% pure and target is
backed with Al foils of ~1.8-2.1 mg/cm2
No information on source of the uncertainty
Estimated error in the thickness of the
Error due to the fluctuation in the beam
Error due to dead time is less than 10%
dependent detector efficiency is less than 2%
Errors due to decrease in the oxygen ion
beam intensity caused by scattering while transferring
through the stack are less than 1%
The overall errors in the present work have
been less than or equal to 17%
